What entities are present on the countertop and how are they arranged?
canonical_answer: Various baking ingredients are arranged on a dark speckled countertop surface. A white plastic tub with Pure branding sits on the left side. A white paper bag of self-raising flour secured with a rubber band rests in the center. A blue box of cornflour and a bottle of vanilla extract are positioned towards the right. A pink handwritten note listing measurements lies near a block of butter.
